summary: Verified end-to-end the Validate Polygons admin tool. Backend pytest 28 pass + 1 skip as expected. Live validator endpoint returns exactly {total:10, ok:9, warn:0, bad:1} with vis_room_utility_floor as the BAD entry (dead Unsplash 404). Admin sample-rooms list returns 10, customer-facing list returns 9 (Utility hidden because active=False). Frontend admin UI: Validate button visible, banner with green '9 OK' + red '1 bad' pills appears after click, issues list shows Utility Room with 'Image fetch failed: 404' reason + '(Fix in editor)' deep-link, BAD pill overlays the Utility thumbnail, and clicking Fix opens the Sample Room Editor modal pre-populated with Utility Room data. All requested data-testid attributes are present and wired correctly.

issues: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' originating in AdminDashboard render. Pre-existing, unrelated to this change but worth fixing.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard list-key warning should be addressed (not introduced by this iteration but visible during validator testing).
Validator endpoint took ~2-4s in this run — well below the 60s budget; no perf concerns.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded sample rooms.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validator endpoint is POST /api/admin/visualizer/sample-rooms/validate-polygons and is fast (<5s in practice because most images are cached/CDN-fronted). Frontend testids in use: visualizer-admin-validate-btn, visualizer-admin-validation-summary, visualizer-admin-validation-issues, visualizer-admin-validation-fix-{id}, visualizer-admin-room-status-{id}. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' for /admin/visualizer (networkidle hangs due to background polling).
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration verified a feature ship; no bugs found. The single BAD result for vis_room_utility_floor is an intentionally flagged dead Unsplash URL that was set active=False in seed; admin can replace via Fix in editor.
